# Gobbly

> All-in-one restaurant management platform — POS, kitchen display, digital menus, QR ordering, and smart payments in a single app.

## About

Gobbly is a web-based restaurant management platform designed for restaurants, bars, and food trucks. It combines point-of-sale (POS), kitchen display system (KDS), digital menu with QR ordering, and payment processing into one unified application.

## Key Features

- **Point of Sale (POS)**: Table management, order taking, bill splitting, and payment processing
- **Kitchen Display System**: Real-time order tracking with status management (Pending, Cooking, Ready, Served)
- **Digital Menu & QR Ordering**: Customizable digital menus accessible via QR code, with allergen information
- **Smart Payments**: Integrated payment processing with multiple payment methods

## Pricing

- Starter: €19/month — 1 location, core POS features, 1-month free trial
- Professional: €39/month — Up to 3 locations, kitchen display, QR menus, priority support
- Enterprise: €49/month — Unlimited locations, API access, dedicated support, custom integrations

## Links

- Website: https://gobbly.app
- App: https://gobbly.app
- Pricing: https://gobbly.app/en/pricing/
- FAQ: https://gobbly.app/en/faq/
- Contact: https://gobbly.app/en/contact/

## Languages

Available in English, Spanish, and Catalan.

## Location

Based in Barcelona, Spain.
